filters.summaryLastYearsAndMonths: from the last {years} years and {months} months

explainer.title: The OpenCouncil Map
explainer.p1: On this map you can see topics discussed by the municipalities that take part in OpenCouncil in their council meetings. You can filter for more recent topics, or for topics in specific categories.
explainer.p2: The topics and their locations are extracted and organized automatically using artificial intelligence.
explainer.p3: Only topics that concern a specific location are shown (e.g. a topic about a street market, but not a topic about the municipality's budget), and only from meetings that OpenCouncil covers with the municipality's support.
explainer.p4: You can learn more about a topic by clicking on it, and open the topic page to see council members' positions, or the full transcript of the meeting.
explainer.p5: If your municipality does not take part in OpenCouncil, you can request that it joins by clicking on it.
